description_long: This object is a bright orange pumpkin with a textured, bumpy surface and a short, greenish-brown stem at the top. The front face features a classic jack-o'-lantern carving with two triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth, all cut out in black. The sides and back of the pumpkin are uncarved, displaying only the orange, dimpled skin. The stem is slightly rough and irregular, adding to the natural appearance. The pumpkin appears solid and is likely made of a lightweight material, possibly foam or plastic, commonly used for decorative purposes. Its size and design suggest it is intended as a festive Halloween decoration for outdoor or urban settings.
description: A textured orange pumpkin with a greenish stem and a classic jack-o'-lantern face carved on the front. The sides and back are uncarved, showing only the orange surface.
description_view_0: The front view shows the jack-o'-lantern face with triangular eyes, nose, and a wide, jagged mouth.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the pumpkin's textured orange surface and a partial glimpse of the carved face.
description_view_2: The back view displays the uncarved, bumpy orange surface with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the pumpkin's orange texture and a partial view of the mouth and one eye from the carved face.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern face with two triangular eyes, a triangular nose, and a wide, jagged mouth. The style is classic and simple, with all features cut out in black.
